comment.body: Hi Alma, thanks for your comments. I wanted to point something out that I used to watch in the old old days of Yahoo Message Boards during the 1990s dot com. If you look at the message count for this chat thread you can easily see that how the greatest number of posts lie at the lows from a few weeks ago. It's always interesting to watch how this mirrors the market. Thanks again for your work!
